The '''Hairy Savages''' were primitive, violent, [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]], predatory [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] indigenous to [[Kuras III]]. The term was assigned to the [[Species/Legends|species]] who was known to attack anything on sight.

{{Species-stub}}
